title: Surgeon Vacancy at Boehringer Ingelheim India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Boehringer Ingelheim India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Boehringer Ingelheim India in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Boehringer Ingelheim India:
Boehringer Ingelheim India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boehringer Ingelheim India!
